Title: Story, George Henry
Overview: First curator of Paintings, Drawings and Prints of the Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York.
Selected Bibliography: Catalogue of the Paintings in the Metropolitan Museum of Art. New York: The Metropolitan Museum of Art, 1900.
Sources: Tomkins, Calvin. Merchants and Masterpieces: The Story of the Metropolitan Museum of Art. 2nd. ed. New York: Henry Holt, 1989, p. 79, 112.
